message:
test(wasm): add 27 tests for SyncState, decode_snapshot_cells, and WsMessage serde

Cover edge cases: empty/non-aligned/truncated cell decoding, delta
expansion for out-of-bounds indices, seq max preservation, cursor/screen
preservation, duplicate index last-write-wins, saturation arithmetic,
and serde roundtrips for all WsMessage variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
